overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a red coat mounting a horse at a mountain campsite and riding along a narrow ridge trail with expansive views of snow-capped mountains and forested valleys. The sequence captures the departure from camp and journey along a scenic mountain path.

events.description: character mounts the brown horse and begins riding

agents.ego_description: character in red coat approaching and mounting the lead horse near the campsite tent

notable_agents.action: pack horse with supplies standing nearby waiting to be led

entered.detail: tan leather tent with open entrance flap
wooden support poles near the tent entrance
steep gray rocky mountain slope behind the camp
small campfire with embers and smoke

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a mountain campsite featuring a leather tent and campfire. The character mounts a horse while a second pack horse waits nearby. Pine trees and rocky mountain slopes surround the camp area.

events.description: passes the campfire and exits the immediate campsite area into the forest trail
emerges from tree cover into brighter sunlight as the trail opens up

agents.ego_description: riding the horse along a narrow dirt trail winding through trees and rocks, leading the pack horse behind

notable_agents.action: pack horse being led on a rope following the main horse

entered.detail: large gray rock formation beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The rider moves along a narrow dirt trail through a wooded area, passing large boulders and pine trees. The campsite falls behind as the trail winds through the forest with rocky outcrops visible on the sides.

events.description: emerges from wooded trail to open mountain overlook revealing expansive valley
camera pans left to showcase the snow-capped mountain range and forested valley below

agents.ego_description: riding along the mountain ridge edge, pausing to take in the expansive view of the distant snow-capped peaks

entered.detail: distant mountain range with white snow peaks against blue sky
dense green forest covering the valley floor below
rocky outcrop at the edge of the trail with steep drop-off

segments.scene_description: The trail opens to a breathtaking mountain overlook with panoramic views of snow-capped peaks and a vast forested valley. The rider moves along the ridge edge as the camera pans to capture the expansive scenery.

events.description: continues along the winding narrow trail with steep drops visible to the left

agents.ego_description: carefully riding along the narrow rocky ridge path with the pack horse following behind

notable_agents.action: pack horse following closely on the narrow trail

entered.detail: steep mountain slope dropping away from the trail edge

segments.scene_description: The rider continues along the narrow mountain ridge trail with steep drops on one side and rocky slopes on the other. The snow-capped mountains remain visible to the left while the forested valley extends to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in the intimacy of a mountain campsite and expands into a breathtaking panoramic journey along a high ridge. It begins with the character mounting a horse beside a leather tent and campfire, surrounded by dense pine trees and rocky slopes. As the rider departs, the scene shifts into a wooded area where the trail winds past large boulders and thick forest, leaving the camp behind. The environment then opens abruptly into a vast mountain overlook, where the camera pans to reveal snow-capped peaks and a deep forested valley. Finally, the movement continues along the narrow edge of the ridge, balancing steep drops against the expansive backdrop of the distant mountains and the valley below.
